artPrompt: An evocative scene of a grimy carnival payout booth glowing hot-gold at the end of a deserted midway, a heap of dice and coins spilling across its sill while a single endless line of shadowy gamblers snakes away from a brightly lit betting window opposite. Lurid neon and ember sparks haze the smoky black night. Deep film-still perspective contrasting the two windows, rendered as gritty cinematic digital concept art — highly detailed, dramatic photoreal lighting, atmospheric haze, realistic textures.
name: Payout Window
text:
At the beginning of your end step, count the dice rolled and coins flipped at the table this turn (by anyone). Choose one based on that total:
• 0 — the window is closed. The clerk shrugs.
• 1 to 3 — you create that many Treasure tokens.
• 4 or more — each opponent loses 3 life, you gain 3 life, and you create three Treasure tokens. The carnival had a good night.
flavorText: The line at the payout window is always shorter than the line at the betting window. Always.

extras.dice: scales off the whole table's rolls and flips
